if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
ci.comp_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.comp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.rpst_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.chrg_prsn LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.sql: ci.comp_id, ci.comp_nm, ci.comp_rmk, ci.rgst_no, ci.corp_no, ci.rpst_nm, ci.zip_cd, ci.addrs1, ci.addrs2, ci.chrg_prsn, ci.tel_no, ci.biz_nm, ci.biz_cd, ci.main_prdt, ci.prd_amt, ci.photo_file_id, ci.cmplt_de, ci.fl_area, ci.sales_amt, ci.full_empl_cnt, ci.avrg_work_hr, ci.up_comp_id, ci.del_yn, ci.attach_id, ci.invite_key,
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_comp_info ( comp_id, comp_nm, comp_rmk, rgst_no, corp_no, rpst_nm, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, chrg_prsn, tel_no, biz_nm, biz_cd, main_prdt, prd_amt, photo_file_id, cmplt_de, fl_area, sales_amt, full_empl_cnt, avrg_work_hr, up_comp_id, created_at, created_by, attach_id, invite_key ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{compNm}, #{compRmk}, #{rgstNo}, #{corpNo}, #{rpstNm}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{chrgPrsn}, #{telNo}, #{bizNm}, #{bizCd}, #{mainPrdt}, #{prdAmt}, #{photoFileId},
TO_DATE(#{cmpltDe}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
, #{flArea}, #{salesAmt}, #{fullEmplCnt}, #{avrgWorkHr}, #{upCompId}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{attachId}, #{inviteKey} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_comp_info SET comp_nm = #{compNm}, comp_rmk = #{compRmk}, rgst_no = #{rgstNo}, corp_no = #{corpNo}, rpst_nm = #{rpstNm}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, chrg_prsn = #{chrgPrsn}, tel_no = #{telNo}, biz_nm = #{bizNm}, biz_cd = #{bizCd}, main_prdt = #{mainPrdt}, prd_amt = #{prdAmt}, photo_file_id = #{photoFileId},
cmplt_de = CAST(#{cmpltDe} AS DATE), fl_area = #{flArea}, sales_amt = #{salesAmt}, full_empl_cnt = #{fullEmplCnt}, avrg_work_hr = #{avrgWorkHr}, up_comp_id = #{upCompId}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, attach_id = #{attachId}, invite_key = #{inviteKey} WHERE comp_id = #{compId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_comp_info ci
where 1=1

SELECT
created_at, updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM tb_comp_info ci WHERE 1=1
order by comp_id

SELECT
created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, 'U' cmd
FROM tb_comp_info ci
WHERE comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT
created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, 'U' cmd
FROM tb_comp_info ci
WHERE invite_key = #{inviteKey}
